description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical aluminum can of beer with a predominantly black background and gold decorative elements. The front features bold Cyrillic text in white and gold, with a central emblem and ornate scrollwork beneath. The top of the can is matte black with a standard pull tab, and the rim is accented with gold text. The back of the can is densely covered with fine print, likely listing ingredients and product information. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a luxurious color palette and detailed graphic flourishes.
description: A tall black and gold aluminum beer can with ornate Cyrillic text and decorative scrollwork, featuring a sleek, modern design.
description_view_0: The can is shown at an angle, revealing part of the main label with gold and white text and a glimpse of the decorative emblem.
description_view_1: This view displays the front of the can, highlighting the bold Cyrillic text, central emblem, and ornate gold scrollwork.
description_view_2: The can is rotated to show more of the side, with the edge of the main label and some fine print visible.
description_view_3: The back of the can is visible, densely covered with fine print in gold, likely listing product details and ingredients.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a black background with ornate gold scrollwork, a central emblem, and bold white and gold Cyrillic typography. The design is elegant and detailed, with a luxurious and modern visual style.
